analysis_window: 2 videos processed, initial baseline still forming

research.notes: All traits tagged unknown across both videos. No trait-based conclusions are possible yet. Hold existing creative direction and focus on tagging new uploads correctly so comparisons become available within 4-6 weeks.

script.word_count_signal: Hold the existing 45-75 word contract. No data exists to justify narrowing the range.

visuals.thumbnail_signal: Hold all existing brand rules. Primary variant default remains B; prefer C if thumbnail text passes the non-clinical word check.

metadata.title_signal: Hold existing title rules. Both live titles use short, specific, emotionally grounded phrasing — continue that approach.
metadata.description_signal: Keep descriptions emotionally accurate and searchable. No changes warranted.

voice.notes: No performance signal available yet. Encode pacing through sentence length and punctuation. Do not issue direct TTS performance directions until retention data supports it.

this_week.hypothesis: A precise, emotionally grounded question as the opening hook may hold attention longer than a statement hook. Untested at this stage — treat as exploratory.
this_week.target_prompt: Produce a short-form script that opens with a single precise question naming a specific behavior or moment in a relational dynamic. Do not open with a statement. Tag hook_type as 'question' in metadata for future comparison.

this_week.hypothesis: Thumbnail text of 3-5 words may be more immediately readable than 6-8 words. CTR data is not yet available, so this is a tagging and observation exercise, not a confirmed signal.
this_week.target_prompt: Generate thumbnail text of 3-5 words that is specific and emotionally direct. Check all words against the banned_thumbnail_words list before finalising. Tag thumbnail_type as 'short-text' in metadata.

wildcard_slots.hypothesis: A script framed from the raccoon's observational POV — describing what it notices without instructing the viewer — may sharpen brand distinctiveness. One data point only; evaluate qualitatively.
wildcard_slots.target_prompt: Write a short faceless essay in which a quiet, perceptive observer describes the specific moment someone realises they have been holding a conversation together alone. Name the behaviour precisely. Do not address the viewer directly. Do not moralise. Tag character_used as 'raccoon-observer' in metadata.

_removed.reason: This channel is a Shorts channel. Introducing a 3-5 minute long-form video is a format change that requires deliberate strategic decision, not a wildcard experiment at two-video baseline. Remove until there is a clear rationale to expand format.

channel_health_signal: Baseline is forming. Two Shorts processed, avg retention 37.22%, avg view duration 13.5s. No CTR or comment data available. The retention split between the two videos (44.75% vs 29.69%) is notable but not actionable at n=2. Consistent tagging of new uploads is the primary operational priority this week.
